tickets.title: Define Phase 6A seed-specific runtime ownership contract
tickets.purpose: Map each Phase 6A seed to exact accepted runtime/control ownership without editing runtime code in planning.
tickets.allowed_role: docs/control planning or separate implementation-control branch if real repo files must change
tickets.stop_condition: Stop if ownership requires changing shared runtime surfaces without a separate control implementation PR.

tickets.title: Create Phase 6A contract and manifest scaffold-control baseline
tickets.purpose: Add or confirm contracts/manifests needed for Phase 6A seed-level FFETs in a separate control PR if missing.
tickets.stop_condition: Stop if business capability behavior is required.

tickets.title: Create Phase 6A API/test validation boundary baseline
tickets.purpose: Add or confirm seed-specific API/test validation surfaces in a separate control PR if missing.
tickets.stop_condition: Stop if schema, permission, API, or module-boundary decisions are not committed.

tickets.title: Create Phase 6A registry and metadata control alignment
tickets.purpose: Prove registry/metadata coverage for Phase 6A seeds from committed source truth.
tickets.stop_condition: Stop if generated registry changes are needed without explicit control scope.

tickets.title: Regenerate Phase 6A FFET pack from accepted control truth
tickets.purpose: Produce audited FFETs only after required control/scaffold truth is accepted on main.
tickets.stop_condition: Stop if any seed still lacks exact files, runtime MCR, validation commands, dependencies, or stop conditions.
